raw_91_c3: v2 wire = order-2 PPM-D-simplified adaptive byte-context coder INLINED into entropy coder. Lazy sparse map for ctx2 + dense order-1 fallback + dense order-0 final fallback. Order-5 sparse-context ESTIMATOR retained as a23_estimate_bytes / a23_hit_rate (build-axis); WIRE = order-2 (genuine algorithmic step over v1 order-1). raw 91 honest C3: F-A23-WIRE-INLINING-1 50pp threshold MET on text-heavy synthetic (F6 fixture: v2=87% v1=17% delta=70pp; production hexa-lang aot_cache_gc.jsonl 79KB: v2=86%); FAILED on n6 atlas 79KB raw text-heavy class (v2=38% < 50% threshold). Per-class A23-v2 vs A18-v2 verdict: A23 v2 WINS small-file (10pp+); A18 v2 WINS text-heavy (production), struct-audit, mixed-real. 80% target NOT achieved this tick (projected 75.77% → ~76.0-76.5%, +0.3-0.7pp lift via small-file class).

a23_v2_design_classification: deterministic integer table lookup for order-2 + order-1 + order-0 PPM-D-simplified adaptive coder. Sparse map storage {ctx_string -> array[257]}; dense order-1 257×257 array; dense order-0 256 array. Range coder identical 32-bit integer arithmetic to A16/A17/A18 (proven raw 137 compliant). NO fp ops; NO neural mixer; NO non-deterministic similarity. Escape mechanism = fixed escape_count=1 (no learned escape per PPM-Z, per raw 137 deterministic).
